message:
perf(widgets): wire set_fast into table, rule, and constraint_overlay (bd-1kbwc)

Replace 6 buf.set() calls with buf.set_fast() in Rule::fill_rule_char (1),
ConstraintOverlay::draw_requested_outline (4), and Table column divider
rendering (1). All are single-char width-1 glyphs eligible for set_fast's
early-exit fast path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
